The SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025 has been released by the Staff Selection Commission (SSC).

As per the latest updates, the final marks and scorecard were made available on February 17, 2026, at the official website ssc.gov.in. This follows the declaration of the SSC GD final result on January 15, 2026.

FOLLOW US

Candidates who appeared in the PST/PET and DV/DME/RME stages can now download their SSC GD final scorecard 2025 using their registration number and password. The scorecard displays normalized CBT marks and overall qualifying status after all recruitment stages. The download window is limited - typically a short period - so act quickly before the link deactivates.

Key Highlights:

  • Release Date: February 17, 2026
  • Last Date to Download: March 1, 2026 (till 6:00 PM)
  • Access: Online only via ssc.gov.in login
  • Purpose: View final marks, compare with cut-offs, and save for records/joining

Particular Details
Exam Name Constable (GD) in CAPFs, SSF, NIA, Rifleman (GD) in Assam Rifles, and Sepoy in NCB Examination 2025
Conducting Body Staff Selection Commission (SSC)
Final Result Status Declared on January 15, 2026
Scorecard Status Released on February 17, 2026
Mode of Scorecard Online only

PET/PST and Medical Stages Conducted post-CBT shortlisting
Final Result Declaration January 15, 2026

Direct Link to Check SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025

Candidates can access the SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025 through the direct link on the SSC portal under the “Result/Marks” section after logging in. The portal may redirect from legacy links, but use ssc.gov.in primarily.

SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025 – Direct Link (Active)
(Login required at ssc.gov.in for marks download)

Step-by-Step Guide to Download SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025

  1. Visit the official Staff Selection Commission website: ssc.gov.in.
  2. Click on the “Login” or “Candidate Login” button on the homepage.
  3. Enter your registration number/username, password, and captcha (if prompted).
  4. After logging in, navigate to the “Result/Marks” tab on your dashboard.
  5. Select “Constable (GD) in CAPFs, SSF, NIA and Rifleman (GD) in Assam Rifles Examination 2025” from the list.
  6. Click on the “SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025” or “Marks” link to view your details.
  7. Your final scorecard will display on screen - review marks, cut-off comparison, and status.
  8. Download the PDF and print it for future reference (e.g., document verification). Save it promptly, as access ends after the deadline.
  9. (Use the direct link mentioned above to reach the login faster if available.)

Details Mentioned on SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025

Your scorecard typically includes:

  • Candidate’s name, roll number, registration number
  • Category/sub-category (UR, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, etc.)
  • Exam name and applied post
  • Section-wise marks (General Intelligence & Reasoning, General Knowledge & General Awareness, Elementary Mathematics, English/Hindi)
  • Raw and normalized marks
  • Total marks in CBT (considered for final merit after qualifying PET/PST and medical)
  • Qualifying status (selected/not selected) and any remarks
  • Note on limited availability window

SSC GD Final Cut Off and Merit List 2025

The SSC GD final cut off 2025 was released with the final result on January 15, 2026, and is force-wise, state-wise, category-wise, and gender-wise. It appears in the official result PDF write-up.

Your scorecard marks should be compared to the relevant cut-off for your category/force/state to assess selection. The merit list PDF lists roll numbers of provisionally selected candidates (around 50,047 selected against vacancies), while the scorecard provides individual marks for those who reached physical/medical stages.

(Refer to the official SSC result PDFs for exact cut-off tables - examples range from ~104 to 152+ depending on category/force.)

What to Do After Downloading SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025

Selected candidates: Keep multiple printouts/PDFs of the scorecard and final result for document verification, joining, and force allocation.

Verify details (name, roll number, category, etc.) - report serious discrepancies to SSC regional offices promptly.

Non-selected candidates: Use marks for performance analysis and preparation for future SSC exams.

Download and save copies early - the window closes after the last date.

SSC GD Selection Process 2025 (Short Overview)

The process included:

  • Computer-Based Test (CBT): Four sections totaling 160 marks.
  • Physical Efficiency Test (PET) and Physical Standard Test (PST): Qualifying.
  • Detailed Medical Examination (DME)/Review Medical Examination (RME): Qualifying.
  • Final merit based on normalized CBT marks (for qualified candidates), followed by force/state allocation per vacancies and preferences.

The final scorecard reflects CBT performance post-qualifying stages, available briefly post-result.

Important Links for SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025

  • SSC GD Final Scorecard 2025 Download: ssc.gov.in (login to Result/Marks)
  • SSC GD Final Result 2025 Merit List PDF: Available on ssc.gov.in under Results
  • SSC GD Final Cut Off 2025 PDF: In final result write-up on ssc.gov.in
  • SSC Official Website: ssc.gov.in

Coal India Limited Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

Coal India Limited (CIL) has officially released Advertisement No. 01/2026 dated 05/05/2026 for recruitment of Management Trainees in E-1 Grade in the Mining discipline based on GATE-2025 Scores. CIL is a Schedule 'A', Maharatna Public Sector Undertaking under the Ministry of Coal, Government of India, with Corporate Headquarters at Kolkata - the single largest coal producing company in the world. The notification includes complete details on vacancies, eligibility, selection process, application fee, reservation norms, pay, and application instructions. Candidates are strongly advised to download and read the full notification and FAQs before applying online. The notification PDF is available on the official CIL website.

  • Download CIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF
  • Download CIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 FAQ PDF

Coal India Limited Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 Overview

Organisation Name Coal India Limited (CIL), Kolkata (A Maharatna Company - Govt. of India Undertaking)
Advertisement No. 01/2026 dated 05/05/2026
Post Name Management Trainee (Mining) - E-1 Grade
Department Ministry of Coal, Government of India
Post Code 10 (Mining) | GATE Paper Code: MN
Total Vacancies 276 (Tentative)
Pay Scale E-1 Grade: Rs. 60,000 - 1,80,000/- (Initial Basic Pay: Rs. 60,000/- per month during training period)
Application Mode Online only (via CIL Website - coalindia.in > Career with CIL > Jobs at Coal India)
Selection Mode GATE-2025 Score based shortlisting + Documents Verification (DV) + Initial Medical Examination (IME)
Mandatory Requirement Valid GATE-2025 Score in Mining Engineering (Paper Code: MN) - GATE scores of other years not valid
Official Website https://www.coalindia.in

CIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

Event Date
Date of Advertisement 05/05/2026
Opening of Online Application Portal 08-05-2026 (10:00 AM)
Last Date for Online Application Submission 07-06-2026 (upto 6:00 PM)
Correction Window (for Online Application) Not applicable - no modifications allowed after submission
Age Calculated As On 30-04-2026
Documents Verification (DV) & Initial Medical Examination (IME) To be notified on CIL website (www.coalindia.in)

CIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details

A total of 276 vacancies (tentative) have been announced for the post of Management Trainee (Mining) in E-1 Grade. These are distributed across General (UR), EWS, SC, ST, and OBC (NCL) categories. The vacancy figures may increase or decrease as per actual requirements. EWS vacancies not filled in this recruitment year will not be carried forward as backlog to the next year.

Discipline Post Code Total Vacancies
Mining 10 276*

*Tentative - may increase or decrease as per requirement.

CIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date of online application (07-06-2026). Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. A valid GATE-2025 score in Mining Engineering (Paper Code: MN) is mandatory - GATE scores of any other year (prior to or after 2025) will not be considered valid for this recruitment. The qualifying degree must be from a University/Institute recognized by the appropriate statutory authority in India and must be a regular full-time course.

Candidates having completed their degree or passed their final semester examination as on the cut-off date are eligible. In case of any dispute regarding admissibility of any particular qualification, the decision of the Chairman, Coal India Limited shall be final and binding.

Educational Qualification

Post Code Discipline Minimum Qualification
10 Mining Degree in Mining Engineering with a minimum of 60% marks (55% for SC/ST candidates) from a University/Institute recognized by appropriate statutory authority in India - regular full-time course only
Mandatory GATE Requirement Valid GATE-2025 Score in Mining Engineering (Paper Code: MN) - GATE-2025 only; scores of other years not valid
CGPA/GPA Conversion Conversion in percentage certificate issued by the University/Institute must be attached without fail if degree is in CGPA/GPA/CPI format

CIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit

The upper age limit is 30 years as on 30th April 2026 for General (UR) and EWS category candidates. Category-wise relaxations are available as specified below. The maximum age of any applicant on the crucial date (30th April 2026) shall not exceed 56 years under any circumstance. Departmental candidates of Coal India Limited or its Subsidiary companies are not subject to any age limit.

Category Upper Age Limit / Relaxation
General (UR) / EWS 30 years (as on 30-04-2026)
OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) 3 years relaxation (max 33 years)
SC / ST 5 years relaxation (max 35 years)
J&K Domicile Candidates (domicile during 01.01.1980 to 31.12.1989) 5 years relaxation (as per Govt. of India guidelines)
Ex-Servicemen (ESM) As per extant Govt. of India guidelines (maximum age not to exceed 56 years)
Departmental Candidates of CIL / Subsidiary Companies No upper age limit applicable

CIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee

Candidates applying for the post of Management Trainee (Mining) are required to pay a non-refundable application fee as specified below. The fee must be paid online only. CIL will not be responsible if a candidate deposits the fee in any wrong account. Fee once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances. Candidates are advised to verify their eligibility before applying.

Category Application Fee
General (UR) / OBC (Creamy Layer & Non-Creamy Layer) / EWS Rs. 1,000/- + GST Rs. 180/- = Rs. 1,180/- (Rupees One Thousand One Hundred and Eighty only)
SC / ST / Employees of Coal India Limited and its Subsidiaries Exempted (No Application Fee)

CIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

The selection process for CIL Management Trainee (Mining) Recruitment 2026 is based entirely on the valid GATE-2025 score in Mining Engineering (Paper Code: MN). There is no separate written examination. Eligible candidates will be shortlisted category-wise in the ratio of 1:3 (3 candidates per vacancy) in order of merit based on GATE-2025 Scores/Marks. The final merit list will be prepared on the basis of GATE-2025 Scores/Marks only. An Offer of Appointment will be issued only after successful completion of Documents Verification (DV) and Initial Medical Examination (IME).

Selection Based on GATE-2025 Score

Stage Details
Shortlisting Based on GATE-2025 Score/Marks in Mining Engineering (Paper Code: MN); shortlisted category-wise in ratio of 1:3 (3 candidates per vacancy) in order of merit
Documents Verification (DV) Shortlisted candidates will be called for Documents Verification; intimated via CIL website and registered email ID only
Initial Medical Examination (IME) By the company's Medical Committee as per CIL Medical Attendance Rules; Medical Committee decision is final and binding
Offer of Appointment Issued only after successful completion of DV & IME

Tie-Breaking Rules

1st Tie-Break Candidate scoring higher percentage marks / CGPA in the minimum eligible qualification (Mining Engineering degree) will be placed higher in the merit list
2nd Tie-Break Seniority of age (older candidate preferred) if tie persists after 1st tie-break

Post-Selection Details

Training Period 1-year training-cum-probation period; on successful completion, service confirmed in E-1 Grade as Officer (Mining)
Posting Anywhere in India including Subsidiary companies and Coalfield areas; candidates must submit 3 posting preferences but final posting is as per CIL Management decision
Service Agreement Bond Minimum service of 60 months from date of joining; Bond of Rs. 3 Lakhs + applicable GST; Rs. 5,000/- per month deducted from salary towards bond money, refunded without interest after 60 months

How to Apply for CIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026

Applications must be submitted online only through the CIL official website www.coalindia.in under the section "Career with CIL >>> Jobs at Coal India." Hard copy applications will not be accepted under any circumstances. The online portal will be active from 08-05-2026 (10:00 AM) to 07-06-2026 (6:00 PM). Candidates are advised not to wait until the last date and to register and submit their application well within time. No modifications are allowed after the online application form is submitted. If more than one application is received from a candidate, the most recent/current application will be considered as final.

All documents must be uploaded as self-attested scanned copies - scanned documents that are not clear and legible may result in rejection of candidature. Candidates must have an active email ID and mobile number valid for at least one year - no change in email ID or mobile number will be allowed after submission. For queries, candidates may refer to the FAQs on CIL's website or write to [email protected].

Documents to be Uploaded at the Time of Online Application:

  • Recent passport size colour photograph (not older than 3 weeks, JPG/JPEG format)
  • Signature with black ink pen (JPG/JPEG format)
  • Matriculation/Secondary Board Certificate/Admit Card/Birth Certificate (age proof)
  • Mark sheet of graduation (percentage proof); CGPA/GPA/CPI conversion certificate issued by University/Institute (if applicable)
  • Final/Provisional Degree/Graduation Certificate
  • OBC (NCL) / SC / ST Caste Certificate in prescribed format issued on or after 01.04.2026 (if applicable)
  • Income & Asset Certificate (EWS) issued by competent authority based on income for 2025-26, valid for 2026-27 (if applicable)
  • Discharge/Service Certificate (Ex-Servicemen candidates)
  • J&K Domicile Certificate in prescribed format issued by competent authority (if applicable)

Government/PSU/Autonomous body employees must submit NOC from their current employer at the time of DV & IME, or a proper relieving order at the time of joining.

Apply Online at: https://cdn.digialm.com/EForms/configuredHtml/1258/100589/Index.html (Career with CIL > Jobs at Coal India)

Important Instructions for CIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 Candidates

  • Only Indian Nationals with a valid GATE-2025 score in Mining Engineering (Paper Code: MN) are eligible to apply.
  • Qualifying degree must be regular full-time from a University/Institute recognized by appropriate statutory authority in India.
  • No hard copy applications will be accepted - online submission only via CIL website.
  • Application fee is non-refundable; applications submitted by unqualified candidates will be rejected.
  • No modifications are allowed after online application is submitted - discrepancies between online data and original documents may lead to rejection.
  • GATE scores of any year other than GATE-2025 are not valid and will not be considered.
  • OBC (Creamy Layer) candidates must apply under General (UR) category and are not entitled to OBC (NCL) concession/reservation.
  • OBC (NCL) caste certificate must be issued on or after 01.04.2026 in the latest prescribed format for Central Government/PSU appointment purpose.
  • Government/PSU employees must submit NOC/relieving letter from current employer at DV & IME stage or at the time of joining - no pay protection or bond transfer benefits on joining.
  • Selected candidates must execute a service agreement bond of Rs. 3 Lakhs + GST and serve for a minimum of 60 months from date of joining.
  • Candidates must keep their registered email ID and mobile number active for at least one year - no changes will be allowed.
  • Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature.
  • Any modifications/amendments/corrigendum in the advertisement will be published only on CIL's website www.coalindia.in.
  • All disputes related to this recruitment will be settled within the jurisdiction of Kolkata only.
  • CIL reserves the right to cancel/restrict/modify/alter the recruitment process at any stage without assigning any reason.
  • The decision of the Chairman, CIL on all matters relating to eligibility, acceptance/rejection of applications, selection, and posting is final and binding.

📄 Complete Details & Notification

The State Bank of India (SBI) has officially announced the Trade Finance Officer (MMGS-II) - Specialist Cadre Officer Recruitment 2026 with 100 openings. The detailed notification was published on 13 May 2026 at sbi.co.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 23 to 32 years (relaxations applicable as per category) and hold a Graduate degree in any discipline from a recognized University along with Certification in Forex Operations from IIBF can now submit their online applications from 13 May 2026 to 02 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

FOLLOW US

SBI Trade Finance Officer Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

State Bank of India, Central Recruitment & Promotion Department, Corporate Centre, Mumbai has officially released Advertisement No. CRPD/SCO/2026-27/05 dated 13.05.2026 for recruitment to 100 posts of Trade Finance Officer (MMGS-II) on Regular Basis under Specialist Cadre Officers. The notification includes complete details on vacancies, eligibility, age limit, pay scale, job profile, selection process, application fee, and instructions to apply. The position shall remain in Specialist cadre and will have no provision for conversion into General cadre. Candidates are strongly advised to carefully read the full notification before applying online. The notification PDF is available on the Bank’s official career website.

  • Download SBI Trade Finance Officer SCO Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

SBI Trade Finance Officer SCO Recruitment 2026 Overview

Organization Name State Bank of India (SBI), Central Recruitment & Promotion Department, Corporate Centre, Mumbai
Advertisement No. CRPD/SCO/2026-27/05 dated 13.05.2026
Post Name Trade Finance Officer (MMGS-II) – Specialist Cadre Officer, Regular Basis
Grade / Scale Middle Management Grade Scale – II (MMGS-II)
Total Vacancies 100 (Regular: 88 + Backlog: 12)
Pay Scale Rs. 64820-2340/1-67160-2680/10-93960
Suggested Place of Posting Hyderabad & Kolkata (indicative only; selected candidates may be posted anywhere in India)
Application Mode Online only (via https://sbi.co.in/web/careers/current-openings)
Selection Mode Shortlisting and Interview
Cut-off Date for Eligibility 30.04.2026
Official Website https://sbi.co.in

SBI Trade Finance Officer Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

Event Date
Date of Advertisement 13.05.2026
Opening of Online Registration & Payment of Fees 13-05-2026
Last Date for Online Registration & Payment of Fees 02-06-2026
Eligibility Cut-off Date (Age, Qualification, Experience) 30-04-2026
Interview Date To be notified on SBI website
Call Letter for Interview Sent by email / uploaded on Bank’s website only (No hard copy)

SBI Trade Finance Officer Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details

A total of 100 vacancies have been announced for the post of Trade Finance Officer (MMGS-II) on regular basis, comprising 88 regular vacancies and 12 backlog vacancies. The vacancies include horizontal reservations for PwBD candidates. EWS vacancies are tentative and subject to further directives of Government of India and outcome of any litigation. The position shall remain in Specialist cadre with no provision for conversion into General cadre.

Post Type Total
Trade Finance Officer (MMGS-II) Regular 88
Backlog 12
Total 100

SC: Scheduled Caste | ST: Scheduled Tribe | OBC: Other Backward Class | EWS: Economically Weaker Section | UR: Unreserved | VI: Visually Impaired | HI: Hearing Impaired | LD: Locomotive Disability | d&e: Specific Learning Disability, Mental Illness, Autism spectrum disorder, Multiple disabilities. PwBD reservation is horizontal and included in overall vacancy of respective parent category.

SBI Trade Finance Officer Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the cut-off date 30.04.2026. Teaching and training experience will not be counted for eligibility. The relevant experience certificate from the employer must specifically confirm that the candidate had experience in the related field as required. In cases where the degree/diploma certificate does not specify the field of specialization, a certificate from the concerned university/college specifically mentioning the specialization must be produced.

Educational Qualification and Experience

Qualification / Experience Details
Mandatory Educational Qualification Graduate (any discipline) from Government recognized University or Institution AND Certification in Forex Operations from IIBF (Certificate should be dated on or before 30.04.2026)
Preferred Qualification Certificate for Documentary Credit Specialists (CDCS) / Certificate in Trade Finance / Certificate in International Banking (Certificate should be dated on or before 30.04.2026)
Mandatory Experience Minimum 2 years’ post-essential academic qualification experience in Trade Finance processing in Supervisory/Official role in any Scheduled Commercial Bank
Specific Skills Required Outstanding communication, presentation and processing skills

SBI Trade Finance Officer Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit

Age is calculated as on 30.04.2026. Cumulative age relaxation will not be available. Candidates seeking age relaxation are required to submit copies of necessary certificate(s) at the time of interview, if shortlisted. No change in category of any candidate is permitted after online registration; no correspondence/email/phone will be entertained in this regard.

Category Age Limit / Relaxation
Unreserved (UR) 23 to 32 years (as on 30.04.2026)
OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) 3 years relaxation
SC / ST 5 years relaxation
PwBD (UR / EWS) 10 years relaxation
PwBD (OBC) 13 years relaxation
PwBD (SC / ST) 15 years relaxation

SBI Trade Finance Officer Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee

Application fee and Intimation Charges are non-refundable and must be paid online through the payment gateway integrated with the application (Debit Card/Credit Card/Internet Banking). Transaction charges for online payment, if any, will be borne by the candidate. Application fee once paid will NOT be refunded on any account nor can it be adjusted for any other examination or selection in future. In case of multiple applications, fee paid for other registrations will stand forfeited.

Category Application Fee
General / EWS / OBC Rs. 750/- (Rupees Seven Hundred Fifty only)
SC / ST / PwBD Nil (No fee / intimation charges)

SBI Trade Finance Officer Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

Selection will be on the basis of Shortlisting and Interview. Merely fulfilling the minimum qualification and experience will not vest any right to candidate for being called for interview. The shortlisting committee constituted by the Bank will decide the shortlisting parameters. The decision of the Bank to call the candidates for interview shall be final. Interview will carry 100 marks; qualifying marks will be decided by the Bank. Merit list for selection will be prepared in descending order on the basis of scores obtained in interview only. In case of tie, candidates will be ranked according to their age in descending order. Intimation/Call Letter for Interview will be sent by email or uploaded on Bank’s website only - no hard copy will be sent.

Stage Details
Stage 1 Shortlisting (based on qualification, suitability, and experience as decided by the Bank’s shortlisting committee)
Stage 2 Interview (100 marks; qualifying marks decided by the Bank)
Merit List Prepared in descending order of interview scores; tie-breaking by age in descending order
Probation Period 6 months (as per Bank’s extant recruitment policy)

Grade, Pay Scale & Perquisites

Grade Probation Period Pay Scale Perquisites
Middle Management Grade Scale – II (MMGS-II) 6 Months Rs. 64820-2340/1-67160-2680/10-93960 DA, HRA, CCA, Provident Fund, NPS (Contributory Pension Fund), Leave Fare Concession (LFC), Medical Facility, and other perquisites as per rules in force from time to time

SBI Trade Finance Officer Recruitment 2026 - Job Profile & Key Responsibility Areas

The Trade Finance Officer (MMGS-II) position is in the Specialist cadre with no provision for conversion into General cadre. Suggested place of posting is Hyderabad and Kolkata; however, selected candidates may be posted anywhere in India at the sole discretion of the Bank. Requests for transfer/allotment to any centre other than Kolkata/Hyderabad shall not be entertained.

Area Details
Job Profile Trade Finance Document Scrutiny (LC/Collections/Bank Guarantees) for compliance with Bank/RBI/ICC/FEDAI/regulatory guidelines; Processing of Trade Finance and Forex transactions at a centralized location; Reconciliation of Trade Finance and Forex related entries in Bank’s Trade Finance, Forex and CBS systems and IDPMS/EDPMS; Any other tasks related to Bank’s Trade Finance and International Business back-office operations.
Key Responsibility Areas Accurate and efficient processing of all allotted Trade Finance and/or Forex transactions within benchmarked TAT; Tracking and ensuring periodic activities including maturities, payments, prompt follow-up, customer reconciliation; Timely reconciliation of related accounts/systems; Work closely with all stakeholders to maintain agreed customer TAT; Ensure adherence to all regulatory/bank/ICC/FEDAI guidelines; Participation in RCSA, BCOR, process review and training activities; Timely submission/compliance of all Audit Reports; Any other activity as directed by Team Leaders and Department/Branch Heads.

How to Apply for SBI Trade Finance Officer Recruitment 2026

Applications must be submitted online only through the link available on SBI’s official website https://sbi.co.in/web/careers/current-openings. No other mode of application will be entertained. Hard copy of application and other documents need not be sent to this office. The process of registration is completed only when fee is deposited with the Bank through online mode on or before the last date. Candidates are advised to apply online well before the closing date and not to wait till the last date to avoid any technical issues.

Candidates must upload all required documents at the time of online application; failure to upload documents will result in candidature not being considered for shortlisting/interview. After expiry of the window for online application, no change/correction/modification will be allowed under any circumstances.

Documents to be Uploaded at the Time of Online Application:

  • Recent Photograph & Signature (JPEG)
  • Detailed Resume (PDF)
  • ID Proof (PDF)
  • Proof of Date of Birth (PDF)
  • Caste Certificate & PwBD Certificate (if applicable) (PDF)
  • Mandatory Educational Certificates: Degree Certificate (PDF)
  • Mandatory Certification in Forex Operations from IIBF (PDF)
  • Experience Certificates (mandatory) (PDF)
  • Preferred Certificate, if any (PDF)
  • Biodata Form (duly filled, signed & scanned - available on Bank’s career website under the advertisement) (PDF)
  • Form-16 / Offer Letter / Latest Salary Slip from current employer (PDF)
  • No Objection Certificate (NOC) from present employer (mandatory if working in Government Institute/Public Sector Unit/Public Sector Bank) (PDF)
  • Mandatory Undertaking (format available on Bank’s career page against Adv. No. CRPD/SCO/2026-27/05) (PDF)

Apply Online at: https://sbi.co.in/web/careers/current-openings

Important Instructions for SBI Trade Finance Officer Recruitment 2026 Candidates

  • Candidates must apply online only; hard copy of application and other documents need not be sent to SBI’s office.
  • The position of Trade Finance Officer (MMGS-II) shall remain in Specialist cadre and will have no provision for conversion into General cadre.
  • Teaching and training experience will not be counted for eligibility.
  • Candidates with any disciplinary proceedings pending or contemplated against them as on date will not be eligible to apply; an undertaking must be uploaded at the time of online application.
  • CIBIL: Candidates who have defaulted in repayment under any lending arrangement with Banks/NBFCs/Financial Institutions including credit card dues and have not regularized/repaid their outstanding till the date of issuance of offer of recruitment by the Bank shall not be eligible for appointment.
  • Candidates serving in Govt./Quasi Govt. offices/Public Sector undertakings/Nationalized Banks must submit NOC from their employer at the time of interview, failing which their candidature will not be considered.
  • In case of multiple applications for the same post, only the last valid (completed) application will be retained; fee paid for other registrations will stand forfeited.
  • OBC certificate containing the ‘non-creamy layer’ clause, issued during the period 01.04.2026 to the date of interview, must be submitted by OBC candidates if called for interview.
  • EWS candidates not in possession of “Income & Asset Certificate” for FY2025-26 on or before closure of online application date should apply under “UR Category” only.
  • Outstation candidates called for interview will be reimbursed airfare (economy class, shortest route, to-and-fro) up to a maximum of Rs. 10,000/- on submission of original flight tickets/invoice and boarding pass.
  • All changes/updates/revisions/corrigendum/results will be hosted on the Bank’s website only; no separate intimation will be issued.
  • Any legal proceedings arising out of this advertisement can be instituted only in Mumbai; Courts/Tribunals/Forums at Mumbai only shall have sole and exclusive jurisdiction.
  • Candidates are advised to keep their email ID/mobile number active till the declaration of result and issuance of call letters on final selection.
  • SBI does not endorse, authorize or associate with any external coaching platform, consultancy, individual or digital channel claiming to provide guaranteed selection or insider guidance. Candidates must rely solely on information available on SBI’s official career portal.

RRB ALP Recruitment 2026 Notification Released: Railway Recruitment Boards have announced CEN 01/2026 for 11,127 Assistant Loco Pilot vacancies across Indian Railways with a starting salary of ₹19,900 per month (Level 2, 7th CPC). 

FOLLOW US

This bumper railway vacancy is a major opportunity for candidates preparing for latest Railway Govt Jobs as well as state-wise railway jobs, because applications for RRB ALP Recruitment 2026 can be submitted online for any participating RRB including Ahmedabad, Chennai, Kolkata, Mumbai, Secunderabad and others.

Candidates aged 18-30 years can apply online from 15 May to 14 June 2026 through rrbapply.gov.in.

RRB Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) Recruitment 2026 Overview

Company Name Indian Railways – Railway Recruitment Boards (RRB)
Post Name Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP)
No of Posts 11,127 (All Railways)
Advt No CEN No. 01/2026
Salary Pay Level-2 as per 7th CPC | Initial Pay: ₹19,900/- Per Month
Qualification As per Detailed CEN No. 01/2026 (Post-wise Education Qualification & Medical Standard)
Age Limit 18 to 30 Years (as on 01.07.2026)
Start Date for Apply 15-05-2026
Last Date for Apply 14-06-2026 (23:59 Hrs)
Official Website rrbapply.gov.in

RRB Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF

Candidates who are interested in applying for the RRB Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

Download RRB Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) Job 2026 Short Notification PDF

RRB Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details

Post Name Total Vacancies (All Railways)
Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) 11,127

Eligibility Criteria

  • Qualifications: As per the detailed CEN No. 01/2026. Post-wise Education Qualification and Medical Standards will be published exclusively on the official websites of the participating RRBs.
  • Age Limit: 18 to 30 years as on 01.07.2026. Age relaxation as per Railway rules will be applicable as mentioned in the detailed CEN.
  • Candidates are advised to verify their primary details using Aadhaar during filing of the online application to avoid inconvenience and delays due to special detailed scrutiny at every stage of recruitment process for Non-Aadhaar verified applications.
  • Name and Date of Birth in Aadhaar shall be updated to match 100% with the Full Name and Date of Birth available in the 10th class pass certificate. Aadhaar also needs to be updated with the latest photo and latest biometrics (Fingerprint & Iris) before filling the online application.
  • All terms, conditions, eligibility criteria, procedures and other requirements governing the recruitment shall be strictly as per the detailed CEN No. 01/2026 (along with any corrigendum) to be published on the official websites of the RRBs.

Salary / Stipend

  • Post: Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP)
  • Pay Level: Level-2 as per 7th CPC Pay Matrix
  • Initial Pay: ₹19,900/- per month
  • Other allowances and benefits as applicable to Railway employees under 7th CPC will be as per detailed CEN No. 01/2026.

Age Limit (as on 01-07-2026)

  • Minimum Age: 18 Years
  • Maximum Age: 30 Years
  • Age is reckoned as on 01.07.2026.
  • Age relaxation for SC/ST, OBC, Ex-Servicemen, PwBD and other eligible categories will be as per Railway rules mentioned in the detailed CEN No. 01/2026.

Application Fee

  • Application fee details are not mentioned in this Indicative (Short) Notification. Fee details will be published in the detailed CEN No. 01/2026 on the official websites of the participating RRBs.
  • Applications must be submitted through Online Mode Only at https://www.rrbapply.gov.in.

Important Dates

Event Date
Notification (Indicative) Publication Date 21-03-2026
Opening Date of Application 15-05-2026
Closing Date for Submission of Application 14-06-2026 (23:59 Hrs)

How to Apply

  • Applications must be submitted Through Online Mode Only. Visit https://www.rrbapply.gov.in to fill and submit the online application form.
  • The Opening Date of Application is 15-05-2026 and the Closing Date is 14-06-2026 (23:59 Hrs).
  • Before filling the application, ensure that your Aadhaar details (Name and Date of Birth) match 100% with your 10th class pass certificate and that Aadhaar is updated with the latest photo and biometrics.
  • Candidates of all participating RRBs must apply through the centralized portal: https://www.rrbapply.gov.in.
  • Detailed application procedure, fee payment process, and step-by-step instructions will be available in the Detailed CEN No. 01/2026 to be published on the official websites of the RRBs.
  • Candidates may also visit the website of their respective RRB for region-specific information and updates. Participating RRB websites include: rrbahmedabad.gov.in, rrbajmer.gov.in, rrbbnc.gov.in, rrbbbhopal.gov.in, rrbbbs.gov.in, rrbbilaspur.gov.in, rrbcdg.gov.in, rrbchennai.gov.in, rrbgkp.gov.in, rrbguwahati.gov.in, rrbjammu.nic.in, rrbkolkata.gov.in, rrbmalda.gov.in, rrbmumbai.gov.in, rrbmuzaffarpur.gov.in, rrbpatna.gov.in, rrbpryj.gov.in, rrbranchi.gov.in, rrbsecunderabad.gov.in, rrbsiliguri.gov.in, rrbthiruvananthapuram.gov.in.

NFL Recruitment 2026: Get the latest National Fertilizers Limited recruitment notification 2026 for 21 Management Trainee (E-1 Level) vacancies in various disciplines including Marketing, Finance & Accounts, Materials, Information Technology, Electrical, and Chemical across NFL Units/Offices in India. The online application process starts on 13th May 2026 and the last date to apply online is 12th June 2026. Find NFL Management Trainee vacancies on the official website https://www.nationalfertilizers.com/. You can also get OnlyJobs of "Upcoming NFL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026" notifications for eligible candidates. Also know the direct official link for NFL MT Recruitment 2026 apply online from the NFL career page.

FOLLOW US

NFL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

National Fertilizers Limited (NFL), a Navratna Central Public Sector Enterprise, has officially released Advertisement No. 01 (NFL)/2026 dated 13.05.2026 for recruitment to 21 posts of Management Trainee at E-1 Level in various disciplines including Marketing, Finance & Accounts (F&A), Materials, Information Technology (IT), Electrical, and Chemical across NFL's various Units/Offices in India. The notification includes complete details on vacancies, category-wise distribution, eligibility criteria, educational qualifications, age limit, selection process, pay scale, application procedure, and reservation for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD/Ex-Servicemen. Candidates are strongly advised to download and read the full notification before applying online. The notification PDF is available on the official NFL website and applications are accepted through NFL online portal only.

  • Download NFL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

NFL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 Overview

Organization Name National Fertilizers Limited (NFL) – A Navratna Central Public Sector Enterprise
Advertisement No. 01 (NFL)/2026 dated 13.05.2026
Post Name Management Trainee (E-1 Level) in Marketing, F&A, Materials, IT, Electrical, Chemical
Department Various Units/Offices of National Fertilizers Limited
Total Vacancies 21 Posts (including backlog vacancies)
Pay Scale Rs. 40,000 - 1,40,000 (During training: Rs. 40,000 Basic Pay)
Nature of Appointment Training Period → Regularization after successful completion
Application Mode Online only (through NFL official website)
Selection Mode Written Examination (80% weightage) + Personal Interview (20% weightage)
Official Website https://www.nationalfertilizers.com

NFL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

Event Date
Advertisement Release Date 13-05-2026 (Advertisement No. 01 (NFL)/2026)
Opening Date for Online Application 13-05-2026
Last Date for Online Application Submission 12-06-2026
Edit/Correction Window for Applications 14-06-2026 to 15-06-2026
Cut-off Date for Eligibility (Age, Qualification etc.) 30-04-2026
Written Examination Date To be notified on official website
Personal Interview Date To be notified after written exam results

NFL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details

A total of 21 Management Trainee (E-1 Level) vacancies have been announced across six disciplines including backlog vacancies. The vacancies are distributed across various categories including UR (Unreserved), SC (Scheduled Caste), ST (Scheduled Tribe), OBC (NCL - Non-Creamy Layer), EWS (Economically Weaker Section), and PwBD (Persons with Benchmark Disabilities). Ex-Servicemen (ExSM) reservations are applied horizontally.

Discipline-wise & Category-wise Vacancy Distribution

Post Code Post Name (Discipline) Total
61000124 Management Trainee (Marketing) 13
61000056 Management Trainee (F&A) 03
61000135 Management Trainee (Materials) 01
61000104 Management Trainee (IT) 01
61000043 Management Trainee (Electrical) 02
61000177 Management Trainee (Chemical) 01
Grand Total 21

Note: Backlog vacancies included. PwBD (Persons with Benchmark Disabilities) & ExSM (Ex-Servicemen) reservations applied horizontally as per Government norms.

NFL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions including educational qualification and age limit as on the cut-off date (30-04-2026). Educational qualifications must be from recognized Universities/Institutions with minimum 60% marks (50% for reserved categories - SC/ST/OBC/PwBD).

Discipline-wise Educational Qualification Requirements

Post Name (Discipline) Essential Educational Qualification (Minimum 60% marks - 50% for reserved categories)
Management Trainee (Marketing)
  • MBA/PGDM in Marketing/Agri-Business Management OR
  • M.Sc (Agriculture) OR
  • B.Sc (Agriculture) + Relevant Post Graduation
Management Trainee (F&A)
  • CA (Chartered Accountant) OR
  • ICWA/CMA (Cost & Management Accountant) OR
  • MBA (Finance)
Management Trainee (Materials)
  • B.E/B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering/Material Science OR
  • MBA in Materials Management/Supply Chain Management
Management Trainee (Information Technology)
  • B.E/B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering/Information Technology OR
  • MCA (Master of Computer Applications)
Management Trainee (Electrical)
  • B.E/B.Tech in Electrical Engineering OR
  • B.E/B.Tech in Electrical & Electronics Engineering
Management Trainee (Chemical)
  • B.E/B.Tech in Chemical Engineering OR
  • B.E/B.Tech in Chemical Technology

Minimum Percentage Requirement:

Category Minimum Percentage Required
General/UR/EWS Minimum 60% marks in qualifying degree
SC/ST/OBC (NCL)/PwBD Minimum 50% marks in qualifying degree

NFL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit

Age limit is calculated as on 30-04-2026 (cut-off date for eligibility). Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD/Ex-Servicemen/Departmental candidates as per Government of India rules.

Category Age Limit (as on 30-04-2026)
Minimum Age (All Categories) 18 years
Maximum Age (General/UR/EWS) 27 years
SC/ST 27 + 5 years = 32 years
OBC (NCL) 27 + 3 years = 30 years
PwBD (General) 27 + 10 years = 37 years
PwBD (OBC) 27 + 10 + 3 = 40 years
PwBD (SC/ST) 27 + 10 + 5 = 42 years
Ex-Servicemen/Departmental Candidates As per Government of India rules

NFL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Salary & Pay Scale

Selected candidates will be engaged as Management Trainees at E-1 Level with pay scale of Rs. 40,000 - 1,40,000. During the training period, candidates will receive a basic pay of Rs. 40,000 per month along with admissible allowances. After successful completion of training and regularization, candidates will be placed in the regular pay scale with all benefits applicable to NFL employees.

Post Name Pay Scale During Training Period
Management Trainee (E-1 Level) - All Disciplines Rs. 40,000 - 1,40,000 Basic Pay: Rs. 40,000/- per month + admissible allowances

Additional Benefits (after regularization):

  • Dearness Allowance (DA) as per Government norms
  • House Rent Allowance (HRA)
  • Transport Allowance
  • Other allowances as applicable
  • Provident Fund
  • Gratuity
  • Medical facilities
  • Leave entitlements
  • Performance Related Pay (PRP)

NFL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee

Application fee must be paid online during the application process. SC/ST/PwBD/Ex-Servicemen/Departmental candidates are exempted from payment of application fee.

Category Application Fee
General/UR/OBC (NCL)/EWS Rs. 700/- + Bank Charges (as applicable)
SC/ST/PwBD/Ex-Servicemen/Departmental Candidates Exempted (NIL)

NFL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

The selection process for NFL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 consists of Offline OMR Based Written Examination (150 marks with 80% weightage) and Personal Interview (20% weightage). Final merit will be prepared based on combined marks (80% Written + 20% Interview). Selected candidates will undergo Document Verification and Medical Examination.

Selection Process Stages:

Stage Details Weightage
1. Written Examination Offline OMR Based Written Examination (150 marks) 80% weightage
2. Personal Interview Face-to-face interview to assess personality, communication skills, and suitability 20% weightage
3. Document Verification Verification of original documents and certificates Mandatory
4. Medical Examination Pre-employment medical fitness test Mandatory

Final Merit List:

  • Final Merit = 80% (Written Examination Marks) + 20% (Personal Interview Marks)
  • Selection will be based on merit in respective discipline/category

How to Apply for NFL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026

Applications must be submitted online only through the National Fertilizers Limited official website (www.nationalfertilizers.com). No other mode of application will be accepted. The online portal is active from 13-05-2026 to 12-06-2026. An edit/correction window will be available from 14-06-2026 to 15-06-2026.

Steps to Apply Online:

  1. Step 1: Visit NFL Official Website - Go to www.nationalfertilizers.com → Careers → Recruitment in NFL
  2. Step 2: Register - Register with valid Email ID and Mobile Number to create login credentials
  3. Step 3: Login - Login using generated credentials
  4. Step 4: Fill Application Form - Fill the online application form carefully with all required details including personal information, educational qualifications, post preference, etc.
  5. Step 5: Upload Documents - Upload scanned copies of required documents:
    • Recent passport-size photograph (as per specifications)
    • Signature (as per specifications)
    • Educational certificates and mark sheets
    • Category certificates (if applicable)
  6. Step 6: Pay Application Fee - Pay application fee online (if applicable) through available payment modes
  7. Step 7: Submit Application - Review all details carefully and submit the application
  8. Step 8: Take Printout - Take printout of submitted application for future reference

Important Notes:

  • Only one application per candidate per post is allowed
  • Option for post preference must be exercised carefully
  • Edit/Correction window available from 14-06-2026 to 15-06-2026

Apply Online at: www.nationalfertilizers.com (Careers → Recruitment in NFL)

Important Instructions for NFL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 Candidates

  • Cut-off date for eligibility (age, qualification etc.): 30-04-2026
  • Age limit: Minimum 18 years, Maximum 27 years (relaxation as per category)
  • Educational qualification: Minimum 60% marks (50% for reserved categories) in qualifying degree
  • Only one application per candidate per post is allowed
  • Application fee: Rs. 700/- + Bank Charges for General/OBC/EWS; Exempted for SC/ST/PwBD/ExSM/Departmental candidates

  • Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate

AAICLAS Security Screener Recruitment 2026: Get the latest AAICLAS recruitment notification 2026 for 158 Security Screener (Fresher) vacancies at AAI Cargo Logistics and Allied Services Company Limited (AAICLAS), a 100% subsidiary of Airports Authority of India, on Fixed Term Engagement Contract. The online application process starts on 18th May 2026 and the last date to apply online is 8th June 2026. Find AAICLAS vacancies across Dehradun, Kolkata, Patna, Trichy, Calicut and Udaipur on the official website www.aaiclas.aero. You can also get OnlyJobs of “Upcoming AAICLAS Security Screener Recruitment 2026” notifications for freshers and experienced candidates. Also know the direct official link for AAICLAS Security Screener Recruitment 2026 apply online from the AAICLAS career page.

FOLLOW US

AAICLAS Security Screener Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

AAI Cargo Logistics and Allied Services Company Limited (AAICLAS) has officially released Advertisement No. 01/2026 vide No. AAICLAS/HR/CHQ/Rectt./SS(F)/2026 dated 13/05/2026 for engagement of Security Screeners (Fresher) on Fixed Term Engagement Contract for a period of three years at six airport locations. The notification includes complete details on vacancies, eligibility criteria, application fee, selection procedure, pay and allowances, training details, and general conditions. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full notification before applying online. The notification PDF and online application are available on the official AAICLAS website.

  • Download AAICLAS Security Screener Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF (Advt. No. 01/2026)

AAICLAS Security Screener Recruitment 2026 Overview

Organization Name AAI Cargo Logistics and Allied Services Company Limited (AAICLAS) – A 100% subsidiary of Airports Authority of India
Advertisement No. 01/2026 (No. AAICLAS/HR/CHQ/Rectt./SS(F)/2026) dated 13/05/2026
Post Name Security Screener (Fresher)
Total Vacancies 158 (across 6 airport locations)
Nature of Engagement Fixed Term Engagement Contract (FTC) – 3 Years (further extendable at sole discretion of AAICLAS Management based on performance)
Stipend during Training Rs. 15,000/- per month (stipend period); reduced to Rs. 10,000/- per month on failure in 1st attempt of certification examinations
Consolidated Remuneration (After Certification) 1st Year: Rs. 30,000/- p.m. | 2nd Year: Rs. 32,000/- p.m. | 3rd Year: Rs. 34,000/- p.m. (inclusive of all)
Application Mode Online only (via AAICLAS website www.aaiclas.aero under "Career" column)
Selection Mode Online Interaction / Interview (date intimated via registered email and AAICLAS website)
Eligibility Cut-off Date 01-04-2026 (for qualification); 01-05-2026 (for age)
Official Website https://www.aaiclas.aero

AAICLAS Security Screener Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

Event Date
Date of Advertisement 13/05/2026
Opening Date for Online Application 18-05-2026
Last Date for Online Application 08-06-2026
Date of Interaction / Interview To be intimated on registered email ID and uploaded on www.aaiclas.aero
Eligibility Cut-off Date (Qualification) 01-04-2026
Age Cut-off Date 01-05-2026

AAICLAS Security Screener Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details

A total of 158 tentative vacancies have been announced for the post of Security Screener (Fresher) across 6 airport locations. Candidates can apply for a single location only. The place of posting can be changed to any other location within India at the sole discretion of AAICLAS Management. The indicated number of vacancies are tentative and may increase or decrease as per operational requirements.

Sl. No. Airport / Place of Posting No. of Vacancies
1 Dehradun 17
2 Kolkata 25
3 Patna 37
4 Trichy 28
5 Calicut 17
6 Udaipur 34
Total 158

AAICLAS Security Screener Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

Candidate must be a citizen of India. Candidates not willing to serve on All India Basis need not apply. Candidates who had been selected under previous AAICLAS advertisements in the last 3 years from the date of this advertisement and were terminated due to unsuccessful completion or failure in trainings/examinations need not apply. The eligibility criteria are as on 01-04-2026 (qualification) and 01-05-2026 (age).

While filling up the online form, candidates must enter the percentage of marks of Graduation in numeric form only (e.g. 60, 70, 80 etc.) and not in CGPA grade or any other format.

Educational Qualification

Qualification Details
Essential Qualification Graduation from any recognized Board/University/Institution with minimum 60% marks for General/OBC/EWS candidates and minimum 55% marks for SC/ST candidates
Language Requirement Ability to read/speak English, Hindi and/or conversant with local language
Medical Fitness Requirements Eye/Color blindness examination; unimpaired vision and hearing ability; ability to recognize objects highlighted by X-ray equipment; good oral and written communication skills; good physical strength and ability

Job Profile

The selected candidates will carry out Screening of Cargo & In-line Hold Baggage by technical or other means, which includes identifying and/or carrying out other Security functions at Airport & Cargo Complexes.

AAICLAS Security Screener Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit

Age limit is calculated as on 01-05-2026. The date of birth as recorded in the Matriculation/Secondary Examination certificates will only be accepted. No subsequent requests for change in date of birth will be entertained.

Category Upper Age Limit
General / OBC / EWS 27 years (as on 01-05-2026)
SC / ST 5 years relaxation (max 32 years)
OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) 3 years relaxation (max 30 years)
Ex-Serviceman 5 years relaxation (max 32 years)

AAICLAS Security Screener Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee

Candidates are required to pay a non-refundable application fee online through net banking/credit cards/debit cards/UPI/Wallet etc. Bank charges/commission applicable for the selected mode of payment shall be borne by the candidate. Fee once paid shall not be refunded under any circumstances.

Category Application Fee
General and OBC Category Rs. 750/- (excluding Bank Charges & Other Taxes)
SC / ST / EWS & Women Rs. 100/- (excluding Bank Charges & Other Taxes)

AAICLAS Security Screener Recruitment 2026 - Pay, Allowances & Training Details

All provisionally selected and joined candidates will initially be given a stipend of Rs. 15,000/- per month. After successful passing of all requisite training examinations (fee and TA/DA for 1st attempt paid by AAICLAS), the stipend will be converted to full monthly remuneration. The contract of three years shall start after passing of all certification examinations and not from the date of joining on stipend.

In case a candidate fails in the 1st attempt, the monthly stipend is reduced to Rs. 10,000/- per month and training costs for the 2nd attempt must be borne by the candidate. If the candidate fails in the 2nd attempt, the Fixed Term Contract shall be terminated without further notice.

Consolidated Remuneration (After Certification as Security Screener – Certified)

Period Emoluments (Inclusive of All)
First Year Rs. 30,000/- Fixed Per Month
Second Year Rs. 32,000/- Fixed Per Month
Third Year Rs. 34,000/- Fixed Per Month

Additional Benefits

TA/DA/Lodging & Boarding (on tour) Equivalent to three tier AC rail fare
Leave Privilege Leave – 18 per year + 12 Half Pay Leave (sick leave) + 9 CL + 2 RH
PF Contribution Equivalent to ceiling wage of Rs. 15,000/- i.e., Rs. 1,800/- p.m. as per prevailing EPF Act
Medical Insurance Maximum Rs. 10,000/- per annum reimbursed on purchase of medical insurance for self & dependent family members (on production of certified tax invoice/receipt, if not getting medical benefits from any other source)
Gratuity As per Gratuity Act, wherever applicable

Training Schedule after Joining (All arranged by AAICLAS for 1st Attempt)

Sl. No. Training / OJT Tentative Duration Remarks
01 AVSEC Induction Course 05 days Conducted at BCAS approved ASTIs of Airport Operator / Airline
02 At Airport / RA 03 Months Complete 3 months in civil aviation security operations before appearing for BASIC AVSEC
03 AVSEC BASIC Course 14 days Conducted at BCAS approved ASTIs of Airport Operator / Airline
04 At Airport (OJT on Security Equipment) 01 Month Complete minimum 40 hours OJT on Security Equipment under guidance
05 Screener's Pre-Certification Course (RA or ILHBS) 03 days Conducted at approved ASTI of Airport Operator
06 Testing & Certification of Screener – Standalone (RA or ILHBS) 02 days Conducted by BCAS

AAICLAS Security Screener Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

Candidates with higher percentage of marks at Graduation level will be called first for online interaction in a phased manner, subject to availability of vacancies at a particular station/location. Selection will be done according to the merit list prepared on the basis of marks secured in the interview. Merely appearing in the interview does not reserve any right for selection.

The date of interaction will be intimated to candidates on their registered email IDs and by uploading a circular on the AAICLAS website www.aaiclas.aero. No TA/DA or reimbursement shall be made by AAICLAS for the selection process. After selection, candidates must provide a surety bond of Rs. 1,50,000/- on non-judicial stamp paper of Rs. 100/- (duly notarized) for non-completion of the 3-year engagement period.

Stage Details
Stage 1 Online Application submission at www.aaiclas.aero under "Career" column against Advt. No. 01/2026 on or before 08-06-2026
Stage 2 Shortlisting based on Graduation percentage (higher percentage called first in phased manner)
Stage 3 Online Interaction / Interview (date and mode intimated via registered email ID and AAICLAS website)
Stage 4 Medical Fitness Test (including eye/color blindness examination, vision and hearing, object recognition ability)
Stage 5 Final engagement on Fixed Term Contract basis; surety bond of Rs. 1,50,000/- to be submitted by selected candidates

How to Apply for AAICLAS Security Screener Recruitment 2026

Applications must be submitted online only through the AAICLAS official website www.aaiclas.aero by clicking on the "Apply Now" tab against Advertisement No. 01 of 2026 under the "Career" column. No application will be accepted after 08-06-2026. Applications received through Speed Post, Registered Post, Ordinary Post or Couriers will not be accepted. Only online applications will be accepted.

Candidates can apply for a single location only. Only a single application will be accepted from each candidate. The email ID entered in the application form must remain active until the engagement process is completed; no change in email ID will be allowed once entered. All communications by AAICLAS regarding this recruitment will be made only on the registered email ID of the candidates and not by post.

While filling the online form, percentage of marks of Graduation must be entered in numeric form only (e.g. 60, 70, 80 etc.) and not in CGPA grade or any other format. Candidates already working in any Government Department/PSU/Autonomous Body must produce an NOC from their present employer.

Documents to be Attached with the Online Application Form:

  • Matriculation / Higher Secondary Certificates
  • Graduation Certificate / Degree or Provisional Degree Certificate
  • Graduation Mark-sheet
  • Caste / Category Certificate (if applicable)
  • Aadhaar Card copy
  • One recent passport size coloured photograph (max 20KB size)
  • Application Fee payment proof (online)
  • Scanned Signature (max 20KB size)

*At the time of joining (if selected), candidates must bring all original certificates/mark sheets/experience certificates/professional qualification certificates/training certificates/Aadhaar Card/PAN Card/Police Clearance Certificate (PCC)/Category Certificate (if applicable)/other documents along with one set of self-attested copies.

Important Instructions for AAICLAS Security Screener Recruitment 2026 Candidates

  • Candidates not willing to serve on All India Basis need not apply.
  • Only a single application per candidate will be accepted and candidates can apply for a single location only.
  • Candidates selected under previous AAICLAS advertisements in the last 3 years and terminated due to failure in trainings/examinations need not apply.
  • Percentage of marks at Graduation must be entered in numeric form only; CGPA or any other format will not be accepted.
  • All communications from AAICLAS will be made only on the registered email ID; candidates must keep checking their registered email regularly.
  • No change in email ID will be allowed once entered in the application form.
  • After selection, candidates must submit a surety bond of Rs. 1,50,000/- on non-judicial stamp paper of Rs. 100/- (duly notarized) for non-completion of the 3-year engagement period.
  • The contract period of 3 years starts after passing all certification examinations and not from the date of joining on stipend.
  • During stipend period only one casual leave per month shall be applicable on pro-rata basis.
  • Maximum two attempts will be given for qualifying certification examinations; failure in both attempts leads to termination of Fixed Term Contract without further notice.
  • Training costs for the 2nd attempt (if applicable) must be borne by the candidate; AAICLAS will only make the nomination.
  • Notice period for resignation is minimum 3 months; those resigning with immediate effect must deposit 3 months' salary and no experience letter/verification will be issued.
  • Candidates working in Govt./PSU/Autonomous Bodies must produce a NOC from their present employer.
  • Furnishing false/incorrect information or suppression of material facts at any stage will result in cancellation of candidature or termination of engagement.
  • No TA/DA or reimbursement shall be made by AAICLAS for the selection process.
  • The job is transferable to any station due to operational requirements; place of posting can be changed to any location within India at sole discretion of AAICLAS Management.
  • Any canvassing or bringing political/outside influence shall be treated as disqualification.
  • All further announcements/details pertaining to this recruitment will be published only on www.aaiclas.aero and not by post.
  • For queries, write to [email protected] mentioning Advt. No. and position applied for, or call helpdesk at 011-24667781.

SSB Interview (Likely Duration and Dates) Upto five days SSB between August to September 2026
Age Calculated As On 01-01-2027
Course Commencement January 2027

Indian Army TES-56 Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details

A total of 90 vacancies have been announced for the Technical Entry Scheme (TES-56) course commencing January 2027. The vacancies are provisional and subject to change depending on training capacity at Cadets Training Wings (CTWs) and organizational requirements.

Entry Total Vacancies Eligible Candidates
Technical Entry Scheme (TES-56) 90 (Provisional) Unmarried Male

Engineering Streams & Parent Arm/Service (CTW-wise)

Sl. No. Cadet Training Wing (CTW) Engineering Degree Parent Arm/Service
1 CTW, CME Pune Civil & Mechanical Engineering Corps of Engineers
2 CTW, MCTE Mhow Telecom & IT Engineering (Dual Degree) Corps of Signals
3 CTW, MCEME Secunderabad Electronics & Mechanical Engineering Corps of Electronics and Mechanical Engineers

Indian Army TES-56 Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date of online application (12-06-2026). Only unmarried male candidates who have passed 10+2 with PCM subjects from a recognized education board and appeared in JEE (Mains) 2026 are eligible to apply. Knowledge of Bengali or Kokborok is not applicable for this entry. Candidates must possess the prescribed minimum qualification on the closing date of application submission; admission at all stages is provisional and subject to eligibility verification.

Educational Qualification

Qualification Details
10+2 / Equivalent (Mandatory) Passed 10+2 or equivalent examination with a minimum aggregate of 60% marks in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics (PCM) from any recognized education board. PCM percentage is calculated based on marks obtained in Class XII only.
JEE (Mains) 2026 (Mandatory) Candidate must have appeared in JEE (Mains) 2026. JEE Mains 2026 Application Number is mandatory to be filled for B.E/B.Tech courses.
Marital Status Unmarried male only. Candidates must undertake not to marry until they complete full training.

Indian Army TES-56 Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit

A candidate must not be below 16½ years and above 19½ years on the first day of the month in which the course is due to commence i.e. 01 January 2027. The candidate should not be born before 01 July 2007 and not after 01 July 2010 (both days inclusive). Only the date of birth as recorded in the Matriculation/Secondary School Examination (10th) certificate will be accepted; no other document relating to age will be accepted.

Category Age Limit (as on 01-01-2027)
All eligible candidates (Unmarried Male) 16½ years to 19½ years (Born between 01 Jul 2007 and 01 Jul 2010, both days inclusive)

Indian Army TES-56 Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee

There is no application fee mentioned in the official notification for the Indian Army TES-56 Recruitment 2026. Candidates are advised to visit the official website www.joinindianarmy.nic.in for any updates regarding fee. Applications must be submitted online only and no hard copy of the application is to be sent to the Directorate General of Recruiting.

Indian Army TES-56 Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

The selection process for Indian Army TES-56 Recruitment 2026 consists of multiple successive stages – shortlisting of applications based on JEE Mains CRL, SSB Interview (five days), Medical Examination, Merit List, and finally issuance of Joining Letter. Candidates who qualify the SSB will be called for Medical Examination. The final merit list is based solely on marks obtained in the SSB Interview.

Merely qualifying at the SSB interview does not confirm final selection. If any candidate fails to report at the allotted CTW within 07 days from the allotted date of reporting, their candidature will be cancelled and the next candidate in merit will be upgraded to fill the vacancy.

Stage 1 - Shortlisting of Applications

Basis of Shortlisting Details
JEE Mains 2026 Common Rank List (CRL) Cut-off to be fixed by Integrated HQ of MoD (Army) without assigning any reason. Shortlisting result tentatively in first week of July 2026.

Stage 2 - SSB Interview (Five Days)

Stage Details
Stage I Psychological test, Group Testing. Candidates who fail Stage I are returned on the same day.
Stage II Group Testing Officer tests and Interview by Interviewing Officer. Only those clearing Stage I proceed to Stage II.
SSB Centres Prayagraj (UP), Bhopal (MP), Bengaluru (Karnataka), Jalandhar (Punjab)
Likely SSB Dates August to September 2026

Stage 3 - Medical Examination

Candidates recommended by SSB will undergo Medical Examination at the nearest Military Hospital. Medical standards as applicable for Officers Entry into Army. Proceedings of Medical Board are confidential.

Stage 4 - Merit List & Joining Letter

Merit list prepared solely on the basis of marks obtained in SSB Interview. Higher educational qualifications, previous performances, NCC background etc. have no role in finalization of merit list. Joining Letters issued subject to vacancies and medical fitness.

Minimum Physical Standards on Arrival for Training

Sl. No. Activity Minimum Standard (Officer Cadet - Male)
1 2.4 Km Run 10 Minutes 30 Seconds
2 Push Up 40
3 Pull Up 06
4 Sit Up 30
5 Squats Two Sets of 30 Repetitions
6 Lunges Two Sets of 10 Repetitions
7 Swimming Should know fundamentals of swimming

Indian Army TES-56 Recruitment 2026 - Training Details

The total training duration is 4 years (3+1) at Pre-Commissioned Training Academies (PCTA). Phase-I consists of 3 years of Integrated Basic Military Training & Engineering Training at Cadets Training Wings located at CME Pune / MCTE Mhow / MCEME Secunderabad. Phase-II consists of 1 year of Integrated Basic Military Training & Engineering Training at Indian Military Academy (IMA), Dehradun. On successful completion of 4 years of training, cadets will be awarded an Engineering degree and granted Permanent Commission in the rank of Lieutenant.

Phase Duration Academy Training Type
Phase I 3 Years CTW at CME Pune / MCTE Mhow / MCEME Secunderabad Integrated Basic Military Training & Engineering Training
Phase II 1 Year Indian Military Academy (IMA), Dehradun Integrated Basic Military Training & Engineering Training

Indian Army TES-56 Recruitment 2026 - Pay & Promotion Structure

On successful commissioning, the pay of the officer shall be fixed at the first cell of Level 10 in the Pay Matrix. The training period shall not be treated as commissioned service. A stipend of Rs. 56,100/- per month is payable at IMA only (after 3 years of training). CTC on commissioning is approximately Rs. 17–18 Lakh per annum (excluding free medical cover and travel to home town once a year).

Pay Scale (Rank-wise)

Rank Pay Level Pay Range (Rs.)
Lieutenant Level 10 56,100 – 1,77,500
Captain Level 10B 61,300 – 1,93,900
Major Level 11 69,400 – 2,07,200
Lieutenant Colonel Level 12A 1,21,200 – 2,12,400
Colonel Level 13 1,30,600 – 2,15,900
Brigadier Level 13A 1,39,600 – 2,17,600
Major General Level 14 1,44,200 – 2,18,200
Lieutenant General (HAG) Level 15 1,82,200 – 2,24,100
Lieutenant General (HAG+) Level 16 2,05,400 – 2,24,100
VCOAS/Army Cdr/Lt Gen (NFSG) Level 17 2,25,000/- (Fixed)
Chief of Army Staff (COAS) Level 18 2,50,000/- (Fixed)

Promotion Criteria

Rank Promotion Criteria
Lieutenant On Commission
Captain On completion of 02 years reckonable commission service
Major On completion of 06 years reckonable commission service
Lieutenant Colonel On completion of 13 years reckonable commission service
Colonel (TS) On completion of 26 years reckonable commission service
Colonel / Brigadier / Major General / Lt General / General On selection basis subject to fulfillment of requisite service conditions

How to Apply for Indian Army TES-56 Recruitment 2026

Applications must be submitted online only through the official Indian Army Recruiting website www.joinindianarmy.nic.in by clicking the ‘online application’ button. Hard copy applications will not be accepted under any circumstances. The online portal will be active from 13-05-2026 (1200 hrs) to 12-06-2026 (1200 hrs). Candidates must enter their particulars in the online application and read the terms and conditions before submitting the form.

Candidates are permitted to make changes to incorrectly filled data in the online application until the closing of online applications; the application must be re-submitted each time it is edited. After the closing date, no changes to the online application will be permitted and no representation in this regard will be entertained. Candidates must submit only one application; receipt of multiple applications from the same candidate will result in cancellation of candidature. DIGILOCKER certificates will not be accepted in lieu of original certificates.

Documents to be Carried to SSB Interview:

  • One self-attested printed copy of online application with Roll Number (for submission at Selection Centre)
  • Class 10th pass certificate and mark sheet in original showing date of birth
  • Class 12th pass certificate and mark sheet in original
  • ID proof in original
  • Copy of result of JEE (Mains) 2026
  • Two self-attested photocopies of all the above certificates
  • 20 copies of self-attested passport size photographs

The second printed copy of the online application is to be retained by the candidate for his reference. There is no need to send any print copy of the application to the Directorate General of Recruiting.

Apply Online at: https://www.joinindianarmy.nic.in

Important Instructions for Indian Army TES-56 Recruitment 2026 Candidates

  • Only unmarried male candidates who are citizens of India, subjects of Nepal, or persons of Indian origin from specified countries are eligible to apply.
  • Candidates must possess the prescribed minimum qualification (10+2 with 60% PCM and JEE Mains 2026 appearance) on the closing date of application.
  • No hard copy applications will be accepted – online submission only.
  • Candidates must undertake not to marry until they complete full training; violation will lead to discharge and recovery of training cost.
  • PCM percentage must be entered up to two decimals and must not be rounded off; any false entry will result in outright rejection.
  • Candidate should not have been debarred from appearing in any examination by UPSC.
  • Candidate should not have been arrested/convicted by a criminal court or involved in any court case.
  • Candidate withdrawn from NDA, OTA, IMA, Naval Academy, Air Force Academy or any service training academy on disciplinary grounds is not eligible to apply.
  • Mobile phones and electronic gadgets are banned inside SSB/interview premises.
  • No compensation will be paid in respect of any injury sustained during SSB tests.
  • No request for change of SSB interview date/centre will be entertained or replied to.
  • Candidates appearing for SSB interview for the first time are entitled to AC III Tier to-and-fro railway fare or bus fare including reservation-cum-sleeper charges within Indian geographical limits.
  • Candidates are advised to visit https://www.joinindianarmy.nic.in regularly for updates. Queries will be replied only through the ‘Feedback/Queries’ option on the website. Queries received up to 03 days prior to closing of online application will only be entertained/replied.
  • In case of any dispute between English and Hindi versions of the notification, the English version will prevail.

Ltd. recruitment notification 2026 for multiple vacancies across various positions under Balmer Lawrie, a Miniratna-1 Public Sector Enterprise under the Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas, Government of India. The online application process starts on 13th May 2026 and the last date to apply online is 5th June 2026. Find Balmer Lawrie vacancies across India on the official website www.balmerlawrie.com. Balmer Lawrie Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

Balmer Lawrie & Co. Ltd. has officially released four recruitment notifications dated 13 May 2026 for various positions on Fixed Term Contract and Regular/Executive basis across its Strategic Business Units (SBUs) including Travel & Vacations, Logistics Services, Logistics Infrastructure, Industrial Packaging, Greases & Lubricants, and Corporate HR/IT. The notifications include complete details on vacancies, eligibility criteria, compensation, concessions/relaxations, and application instructions. The cut-off date for post-qualification experience and maximum age is 05.06.2026 for all notifications. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full notification and general conditions carefully before applying online. All changes/updates will be published on the Balmer Lawrie website only.

Balmer Lawrie Recruitment 2026 - Compensation

Travel & Vacations Field Positions (FTC – Notification 2): Compensation will be linked to qualification and experience. Selected candidates will be entitled to eligible statutory benefits including PF, ESI (if covered), Bonus as per the Payment of Bonus Act 1965 (if covered), and Gratuity as per rules.

Executive Positions (Regular – Notification 3):

Grade Basic Scale (Rs.) Initial Basic Pay (Rs.) Net Take Home – X City CTC p.a. – X City

E1 40,000 – 1,40,000 40,000 Rs. 78,210/- Rs. 14.37 Lakhs

Note: IDA is subject to quarterly revision. Basic, Net Take Home and CTC is non-negotiable for personnel applying from Private Sector. CTC includes Basic Pay, DA, HRA, Medical, Other Perks & Allowances, Performance Related Pay, encashment of earned leaves, work-related benefits and Retiral benefits. Post-Retirement Medical Coverage Scheme is applicable to candidates who are 50 years of age or below on joining the regular rolls.

Multi-SBU FTC Positions (Notification 4): Compensation is linked to qualification and experience as per industry standards. (See vacancy table above for position-wise CTC.)

Balmer Lawrie Recruitment 2026 - Age Relaxation

Reservation/relaxation/concession to OBC (NCL)/EWS/SC/ST/PwBD/Ex-SM shall be as per Government of India directives. The cut-off date for maximum age is 05.06.2026.

Category Applicable Age Relaxation (in years)
